title: Flower Seeds 2 Fabulous Flowers
description: Flower Seeds 2 Support for Fabulous Flowers
body:
# Flower Seeds 2 - Fabulous Flowers

  
Fabulous Flowers support for Flower Seeds 2

Adding:

*   Flower crops
*   Villager Trades for seeds
*   Botany Pots, Thermal Insulator, IE Cloche support
*   Flowers now reference vanilla models so any resourcepack that changes flower models should be compatible with the crops

### Flowers Supported

* * *

*   Bloomed Dandelion
*   Orange Poppy
*   White Poppy
*   Yellow Poppy
*   Pink Poppy
*   Yellow Orchid
*   White Orchid
*   Pink Orchid
*   Purple Orchid
*   Blue Allium
*   White Allium
*   Yellow Tulip
*   Purple Tulip
*   Blue Tulip
*   Black Tulip
*   Aster Daisy
*   Gloriosa Daisy
